_note: Recommender data: maps profile keys to installable components. Sources: official Claude marketplace (B9 inventory) unless 'marketplace' says otherwise. Honest gaps are recorded as 'none' with a note — the recommender must never invent a plugin name. Update this file as marketplaces evolve; CI should validate plugin names against the live marketplace list.

bmad.note: BMAD v6 port: 9 agents, 26 workflows. BMAD core team's official installer in progress (bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD#746) — prefer official when released.

spec-kit.note: Installs /speckit.* commands into the repo. Requires uv (Python).

openspec.note: Delta-based SDD, best for brownfield. Requires Node 20+. Package name is @fission-ai/openspec (github.com/Fission-AI/OpenSpec) — the unscoped 'openspec' npm package is an unrelated 0.0.0 placeholder, not this project.

typescript.note: no LSP plugin needed — native support

python.note: no LSP plugin in official marketplace as of 2026-07

postgres.note: no generic postgres plugin — neon/alloydb/cloud-sql-postgresql are vendor-specific; recommend only if that vendor is in use

redis.note: no marketplace plugin — org skill candidate

kafka.note: no marketplace plugin — org skill candidate

gcp.note: no umbrella GCP plugin — per-service (cloud-sql-*, bigquery, alloydb) chosen by stack

vercel.note: no official plugin as of 2026-07 — Vercel MCP via .mcp.json

always.note: evaluation engine, traceability commits, version-accurate docs lookup

e2e.note: pairs with the se-harness e2e planner/generator/healer agents

observability.note: OpenTelemetry for agent sessions/tool calls — the Observability engine. Ask the user which (or neither).

figma_design_system.note: only when org has a Figma design system (B11)

structural.note: A7 bake-off pending — all three are MCP servers configured via .mcp.json, not marketplace plugins. Two unrelated projects share the 'CodeGraph' name: codegraph-ai/CodeGraph (tree-sitter semantic graph, 42+ MCP tools, RocksDB persistent memory layer, VS Code extension) vs colbymchenry/codegraph (lightweight pre-indexed graph, CLI-installed, SQLite, native OS file-watcher auto-sync, no external services) — confirm which repo the user means before installing. colbymchenry/codegraph installs via: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/colbymchenry/codegraph/main/install.sh | sh (macOS/Linux) or npm i -g @colbymchenry/codegraph, then `codegraph install` + `codegraph init [path]`. codebase-memory-mcp has its own installer: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp/main/install.sh | bash
